title: Murder Drones Origins
description: A Datapack which includes custom Origins, items and structures based on the show Murder Drones.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3b4cfbf2441e0d7fcd31c1e9789e814288bec22.png) A Datapack which turns the Murder Drones characters into playable Origins.. There are currently 3 selectable Origins, the ***Disassembly Drone***, the ***Worker Drone*** and the ***Anti-Drone Sentinel***, but there are also 2 more hidden Origins which can be aquired by playing with the rest of the Origins. All *Origins* created by ***Chris_The_Big!*** **Murder Drones** by ***GLITCH Productions*** Thank you to everyone for 30k downloads!! ## Disassembly Drone ***Disassembly Drones***, colloquially known by their prey as ***Murder Drones***. They are bloodthirsty robots sent by **JCJenson** to destroy the **Worker Drones** of **Copper 9** due to the company not wanting there to be *"runaway A.I."* that they can't control.
Spoiler

Harmful Sun:

(When your hunger falls to 4 points, you'll start taking damage. When you're starving, you'll start burning.)

The sun is harmful to you if you don't eat to cool down.

Weak to Fire:

Fire makes you warm up and so it's extremely hurtful to you.

Always Hungry:

The way you are made, you have to eat more to survive.

Heating:

When in hot biomes you become slower and weaker.

Murder Drone Wings:

(LoadToolbarActivator key)

You can equip Metallic Wings, which you can flap to gain height (Pressing the Jump key)

Launch Away!:

(Primary key)

You can use your wings to boost yourself up into the sky.

Metal Legs:

Due to your metal legs, you take less fall damage. You can also crouch before impact to reduce most of your fall damage.

Quake:

Landing from high distances will damage nearby enemies if they are on the ground.

Acidic Tail:

While attacking someone, you have a chance to use your Acidic Tail to Poison your enemy.

Healing Saliva:

(Secondary key)

Your Saliva can heal you when you want, with short cooldown.

Taller:

(Requires Pehkui)

You are taller so you can fit the wings..

Speedy Drone:

You are faster on foot.

Robot Strength:

As a Disassembly Drone, you have increased Strength to take down your prey more easily.

Strong Arms:

You have very strong arms so you are able to break stone with your bare hands.

Metalic Skin:

You're a robot so you have natural armor.

Weird Hands:

You are unable to use a shield due to how your limbs can change form.

Artificial Eyes:

You can see very well in the dark thanks to your robotic eyes.

Carnivorous:

Meat is the only think that can cool you down so that's what you can eat.

Warm, Sweet Blood:

(Hitting mobs has a chance to restore 1 Hunger and 1 Health point)

Since there aren't any robots for you to kill and feed off their Oil, your program has changed so you cool down by hunting animals.
## Worker Drone ***Worker Drones*** are autonomous robots created to help their parent company, **JCJenson** *(In SPAAAACEE!)* mine exoplanets for resources. After the extinction of biological life on **Copper 9**, the company created the ***Disassembly Drones***, known by the **Workers** as ***Murder Drones***, and sent them in spaceships to the destroyed exoplanet to assure the extinction of all ***Worker Drones***.
Spoiler

Artificial Eyes

You can see very well in the dark thanks to your robotic eyes.

Telekinesis

(Primary key)

You can move entities using your Absolute Solver that's in your programming! Requires a Choker to work!

Rapid Regeneration

(Secondary key)

Your Absolute Solver will instanly heal you up to full health but it has a long cooldown. Requires Choker to use!

System Protection

The Absolute Solver in your programming makes any incoming projectiles bounce off you. Requires Choker to work!

My Beautiful doors!

You craft more Doors! (Trapdoors not included..)

Speedy Drone

You are faster on foot!

Weak to Fire

Unlike those Murder Drones, fire deals less damage to you but it's still hurtful.

Heating

When in hot biomes you become slower and weaker.

Shorter

You are shorter than humans.

Long Arms

You have longer arms.

Metallic Arms

You can break natural stone and metallic ores with your bare hands.

Excavator

You have a chance to recieve extra ores from mining.

Metallic Skin

You're a robot so you have natural armor.

Water Weakness

While you don't take damage in water, your body still rejects it and so when you are soaked you get a bunch of negative effects.
## Anti-Drone Sentinels Mechanical droids, resembling **Dromaeosaurs** *(raptors)*, designed to attack and terminate any drone they encounter should they enter their territory.
Spoiler

Boot-Loop Light

(Primary key)

You emit a burst of light that overwhelms the senses of any nearby drone or creature, rendering them motionless for a short amount of time.

Excavator

Your claws allow you to dig very well!

Experienced Climer

With the grip of your claws, you are able to scale any wall with ease.

Wall-Jumping

(LoadToolbarActivator key)

Jump off of walls while Climbing.

Speedy Droid

Your predatory instincts grant you the swiftness to secure your meal.

Mighty Claws

You have sharp claws, which you use to pin your targets down. They are also used for digging and climbing.

Metalic Skin

You're a robot so you have natural armor.

Bite

Feast off the flesh of your prey.

Artificial Eyes

You can see very well in the dark thanks to your robotic eyes.

Metal Legs

Due to your metal legs, you take less fall damage. You can also crouch before impact to reduce most of your fall damage.

Suprise Attack!

Landing from high distances, while holding shift, will damage nearby enemies if they are on the ground.

Smaller Posture

You have the height of the average Drone.

Less Health

You have 8 hearts of max health.

Heavy Armor

Some armor sets are too heavy for you to wear.

Small legs

Your small body means that human sized leggings cover your feet and legs

Carnivorous

While your diet consisted of Oil from Drones, your proggraming now allows you to eat meat.

Deadly Fire

Fire is one of your major weaknesses.

Useless Equipment

Your claws make it so you can't use shields effectively. You also don't rely on wings for hunting. You prefer silent stalking of your prey..

Water Sensitivity

While you don't take damage in water, your body still rejects it and so when soaked you get a bunch of negative effects."

Always Hungry

The way you are made, you have to eat more to survive.

Heating

When in hot biomes you become slower, weaker and are unable to hit mobs without tools.
